content.text:
Now I have a clear view of atom C:10. From the image, I can see that atom C:10 (carbon with index 10) is covalently bonded to:

1. N:11 (nitrogen, index 11) - shown by the blue bond
2. C:9 (carbon, index 9) - shown by the yellow bond
3. H:25 (hydrogen, index 25) - shown by the white bond

These are the three atoms directly connected to C:10.

Regarding the geomconf_index, based on the file name "geomconf_1357.xyz", the geomconf_index for this molecule is 1357.

So the neighbor atoms of atom 10 (C) are:
- Atom 11 (N)
- Atom 9 (C)  
- Atom 25 (H)

And the geomconf_index is 1357.

question: Please find the neighbour atoms of the atom with atomic index 10, whose element should be C. Here, neighbour atoms are defined as atoms that are covalently connected to this atom. Report all neighbour atoms by listing their atomic index (as shown in the image) and their element. Also return the geomconf_index for this molecule.
